name: Cream Cheese Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces baking chocolate, melted and cooled to room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the cake flour, baking soda, and salt.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine cream cheese, 1/2 cup of shortening, and vanilla extract. Beat with an electric mixer on high until light and fluffy.
3. Add confectioners' sugar and hot water alternately to the cream cheese mixture, beating well after each addition. Blend until smooth.
4. Remove 2 cups of the chocolate mixture and cover with plastic wrap. Reserve for frosting.
5. Blend 1/4 cup shortening into the remaining chocolate mixture.
6. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
7. Add dry ingredients alternately with 1/4 cup of milk, beating well after each addition.
8. Spread batter evenly in two greased and waxed paper-lined 9-inch round cake pans.
9. Bake in a preheated oven set to 350°F for 35 minutes or until the cakes are done.
10. Cool in pans on racks for 10 minutes. Remove from pans and cool completely on racks.
11. Mix 1 tablespoon milk into the reserved chocolate mixture for frosting.
12. Place one layer on a serving plate and spread with frosting.
13. Top with second layer and frost sides and top with remaining frosting.
